reasoning: Response B provides a fully functioning, compilation-ready minimal API application that satisfies almost all requirements. In contrast, Response A hallucinates Polly v8 API methods (e.g., `PredicateBuilder().HandleHttpRequestError()`) which will cause a compilation failure, and its rate limiting configuration is fundamentally flawed because it references an undeclared policy name (`RequireRateLimiting("fixed")`), causing runtime exceptions.
